name: Cheddar Soup with Ham & Jalapenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add carrots, celery, and jalapenos. Cook until vegetables are tender.
2. Gradually whisk in flour, cooking for about 6 minutes to create a roux.
3. Slowly add chicken stock while whisking frequently to avoid lumps.
4. Simmer the mixture for approximately 25 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and gradually whisk in grated cheddar cheese until smooth.
6. Blend in heavy cream. Add Worcestershire sauce, dry mustard, dark beer, and Parmesan cheese. Whisk until well combined.
7. Stir in diced ham and scallions. Season with salt and hot pepper sauce to taste.
8. If desired, add more chicken stock for a thinner consistency.
